title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 08 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 08 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 08 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 08/03/2024
DCE iron ore futures fall today, the main contract I2405 closed 877. an decrease of 1.13% throughout the day;Some traders adopt separate quotaƟons; Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high. PBF at Shandong port dealt 873-880 yuan/mt; decreased 13-20 yuan/mt over yesterday.
